headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Equity Residential, Lowers Price Target to $67
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Steve Sakwa   maintains Equity Residential (NYSE:EQR) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $70 to $67.
